_publications._publicationTitle: Functional interactions between neurofibromatosis tumor suppressors underlie Schwann cell tumor de-differentiation and treatment resistance.

_contextSnippet: combination molecular therapy additively inhibited JW23.3 and JW18.2 allograft growth compared to vehicle or selumetinib or NVS-PAK1-1 monotherapy
details: Combination molecular therapy with selumetinib and NVS-PAK1-1 additively inhibited JW18.2 allograft growth compared to vehicle or monotherapy
